visual_description: A woman with curly blonde hair, wearing a dark cardigan, sits facing a man in a plaid shirt, both holding sandwiches; the man gestures with his hand while eating. The background shows other patrons in a busy cafeteria or dining area, with blurred figures and tables. The woman looks at the man, her gaze directed toward him as he speaks and gestures.
